Nursing.baseline: I help the patient with their meds.
Nursing.target: Facilitation of medication administration is performed to ensure patient safety.
Wound integrity assessment is conducted to monitor healing progress.

Hospitality.baseline: I help the guest with their bags.
Hospitality.target: Assistance with luggage conveyance is provided to ensure guest convenience.

Hospitality.baseline: I fix the room for the guest.
Hospitality.target: Refinement of guest accommodation is executed to meet service standards.
